mapper.sql: id, institute_name, institute_type, is_delete, version, create_time, last_access_time
mapper.update:
update t_org_institute set is_delete = 0 where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: insert t_org_institute(institute_name, institute_type, create_time, last_access_time) values (#{instituteName}, #{instituteType}, #{createTime}, #{lastAccessTime})
mapper.select: select institute_name, institute_type from t_org_institute where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update t_org_institute set institute_name = #{name}, institute_type = #{type} where id = #{id}
